prompt:
Goal: Create a dramatic anime fighting-game character poster for Yuri Sakazaki, showing two dynamic depictions of the same young female martial artist in a gritty urban battle scene.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 landscape composition, high-resolution promotional key art, dark cinematic lighting, sharp anime rendering, glossy highlights, heavy motion effects.

Layout: Place the main action figure on the left, leaping diagonally forward with one knee raised and one fist clenched, occupying about half the image. Place a second depiction of the same character on the right in a school-uniform fighting pose, turned partly away, with one open palm thrust toward the viewer; her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur. Center the typography vertically between the two figures, layered over black-and-blue paint strokes and red slash effects.

Discrete visible character elements: exactly 2 character depictions: 1) left combat outfit version, airborne kick pose; 2) right school-uniform version, defensive open-palm pose with blurred face.

Subject details: The character has brown hair in short bob-length layers with a side braid, red headband, red hair ribbons, expressive anime eyes on the left figure, athletic build, confident smile, and martial-arts energy. Left outfit: white sleeveless gi-style top with dark trim, brown belt, deep purple leggings, purple fingerless gloves, red-orange high-top sneakers with white laces, and a red headband. Right outfit: white sailor-style school blouse with navy collar, navy pleated skirt, yellow fingerless glove on the forward hand, red scarf or ribbon tied near the braid, and a blue-toned shadowed lower half.

Background: Nighttime city skyline with tall skyscrapers, lit windows, tilted perspective, black asphalt-like texture, exploding white debris, rain-like sparks, blue energy streaks, red paint splatters, and diagonal speed lines. Use a gritty black, navy, red, and white palette with high contrast and metallic grunge texture.

Text content: Include large distressed Japanese brush-calligraphy text in the center reading 極限流 空手. Add smaller Japanese text reading ユリ・サカザキ. Add small red English text near the bottom center reading YURI SAKAZAKI. In the upper right background, include faint oversized weathered letters spelling “YURI.”

Typography style: White cracked stone brush lettering with rough edges, black shadows, red underline slashes, and dramatic layered depth; the English name should be narrow uppercase serif or condensed lettering in red.

Constraints: Keep exactly 2 character depictions, no extra characters, no watermark, no logos besides the specified name text, preserve the rectangular face blur on the right figure, make the pose energetic and poster-like.
